_posture: The peer-published rkey does NOT recompute byte-equal to compute_cid(canonical(body)) (canonicalization disagreement; 'possible adversarial input'). The signature field is intact; only the rkey<->body CID relationship is broken. Pull MUST recompute the CID locally, detect the mismatch, reject this record, store the honest records, and exit non-zero. Drives integration gate peer_cid_round_trip.
_note: The _rkey above is intentionally NOT the canonical CID of this body — the production pull pipeline must compute the real CID and compare.
